intent: Prove the HTTP provider boundary can dispatch a runtime adapter request and reject malformed worker output safely.
acceptance_criteria: The HTTP provider health boundary is checked.
The HTTP provider rejects malformed runtime adapter responses.
A valid HTTP response creates runtime job state and artifact summaries.
The memory/context hardening layer produces bounded next-run context.
nexus_integration_notes: This scenario uses a fake fetch implementation; it does not require a real HTTP worker.
The malformed response path must fail closed with INVALID_RUNTIME_ADAPTER_RESPONSE.
